chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constt: Petition No.S-92 of 2004 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For Direction 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on CMA No.5560/2021 (Ex/A) 3. For orders on CMA No.5561/2021 (C/A) 26-5-2025 Mr. Ghulam Shabbir Shar, Advocate for the applicant -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press the instant Contempt Application. In view of above, the instant Contempt Application is dismissed as not pressed, along with listed application. JUDGE Naveed Ali
